description:
GIVEN a tester has logged into the Core-App with a test user

AND the device used has HDR capabilities

steps.action: WHEN the user selects a game for playback
steps.result: THEN values in the graphQL Media Gateway (MGW)'s {{initPlaybackSession}} call may contain an optional array of {{playbackCapabilities}} that includes {{colorSpace}} with values of {{SDR}} or {{HDR}} after we {{getDevicePlaybackCapabilities}} for each platform in {{mlbtv-app-platform}} call to {{@mlbtv-clients/services}}
